title: Silky Smoky Haddock Broil
description: This brunch-mood Norwegian dish features silky smoked haddock broiled to perfection in a Mediterranean-friendly sauce that balances smokiness and creaminess.

ingredients.name: 1 tsp smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: smoked for a richer, deeper flavor

ingredients.name: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Place the haddock fillets on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Mix together the heavy cream, lemon juice, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper in a small bowl. Pour over the haddock fillets evenly.
Bake for about 12-15 minutes or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
Garnish with fresh parsley if desired before serving.
Serve hot as an accompaniment to your brunch spread.
